what_it_does: This file is a draft noticeboard document that records an exploration of a host-not-master architecture using Obsidian as a host, presented as one lens, with block-addressable content for commenting.
observations: YAML frontmatter carries id, address, type document, source claude_code, state draft, title, author_session, channel dragnet-development, and a long order list of board:// items.
The order array references fourteen related noticeboard items.
History shows two transitions: filed from null to draft, then an edit-to-order change with note 'obsidian perspective'.
Body is only two sentences and contains no code symbols.
Created and updated timestamps are seconds apart, indicating a single filing-and-ordering action.
standouts: Title frames a specific architectural lens: 'Host-not-master architecture — Obsidian-host exploration'.
Order list of fourteen items signals this document acts as a hub or index for a thread.
Body explicitly invites block-level commentary on any part.
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter, id, address, type, source, state, title, channel, order, timestamps, and history.
Uses board:// URIs to express ordering relationships.
Markdown body is kept minimal and declarative.
concerns: Body is extremely thin compared with the rich metadata and long order list, so the exploration is not yet substantiated in the file.
Key terms such as 'host-not-master' and 'Obsidian-host' are not defined here.
The fourteen ordered items are listed without any visible grouping or rationale in this file.
notes: A draft index-like noticeboard item proposing an Obsidian-as-host lens for a host-not-master architecture, linking to fourteen related items and inviting block-level commentary.
questions: What exactly does 'host-not-master architecture' mean in this context?
Is Obsidian intended as the only host or one of several host lenses?
What is the intended relationship or narrative sequence among the fourteen ordered items?
Is this document meant to become a decision record, a design sketch, or a discussion seed?
purpose_vs_actual: The title states an exploration of Obsidian as host in a host-not-master architecture, but the actual content is a sparse placeholder/index with an order list and a comment invitation, so it has not yet delivered the exploration.
apparent_themes: Obsidian as an integration or hosting surface
hub/index documents that link related artifacts
intention_signals: It appears to seed a design discussion about using Obsidian as a non-mastering host for code and design substrates, with block-level comments used to build the exploration across linked items.
novelty: The framing of 'host-not-master' and 'Obsidian-as-host' as a lens, combined with an explicit block-addressable commenting method, is distinct from a conventional architecture note.
contribution: Provides a named lens and a hub that links fourteen related items, establishing an entry point and relationship anchor for block-level commentary on an Obsidian-as-host exploration.
summary_for_embedding: Draft noticeboard document titled 'Host-not-master architecture — Obsidian-host exploration' that links to fourteen related board items and invites block-level comments on an Obsidian-as-host design lens.
